entity.summary: Permissionless concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange serving as a liquidity hub on Scroll, with active swaps, liquidity pools, protocol fees, revenue, and substantial cumulative trading volume.
entity.notes: The original Honeypop application URL currently redirects to the Scroll DEX swap surface. DefiLlama identifies Honeypop DEX as a Scroll CLMM and reports current TVL, non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour volume, fees, and protocol revenue. HEI preserves the original Honeypop identity and marks the original URL as redirected rather than inferring a separate successor relationship without stronger lineage evidence.

evidence.title: Honeypop DEX original application redirect
evidence.notes: Original first-party Honeypop application URL redirects to the current Scroll DEX swap surface, supporting redirected URL status while preserving the historical Honeypop entity identity.

evidence.title: Honeypop DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Honeypop DEX as a permissionless Scroll CLMM and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Honeypop DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Honeypop DEX as a Scroll decentralized exchange and corroborates the exchange identity.
